'''Cheb''' was an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] serving in the the [[Fifth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Fifth Fleet]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. The ''[[Ansta]]'' was one of the warships assigned to the admiral's command.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
